holdings.infoBox: YLDE is an equity ETF with a total of 57 individual holdings. The top holdings are The Williams Companies stock at 4.35%, Exxon Mobil at 4.08%, Alphabet at 3.65%, Apollo Global Management at 3.15%, and Nestlé at 2.78%.

overview.description: The Franklin ClearBridge Enhanced Income ETF (YLDE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund seeks income and long-term capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of global dividend-paying stocks while utilizing an options overlay based on US large-cap equity indices. The fund may invest in firms of any market capitalization but focuses on large-cap stocks. YLDE was launched on May 22, 2017 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
